notes: The5ers currency-strength relative-momentum. EA runs one instance per registered host symbol; each instance reads the full 28-pair 8-currency (USD/EUR/GBP/JPY/AUD/CHF/NZD/CAD) FX matrix on D1 to rank currency strength, and trades the host symbol only when it is the strongest-vs-weakest pair. Foreign reads are bound at call site via QM_SymbolGuardInit + QM_BasketWarmupHistory; one position per magic on the host symbol. All 28 pairs verified present in dwx_symbol_matrix.csv.
